'''Gmar Askilon''' was a [[Star/Legends|star]] in the [[Krenhner sector/Legends|Krenhner sector]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].

==History==
The star was where the runaway [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] known as the [[Teljkon Vagabond]] was sighted by [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]]. It was near Gmir Askilon that [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ejagga Pakkpekatt]] and his task force intercepted the Teljkon Vagabond, and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and his team successfully boarded the vessel. With the team onboard, the Vagabond promptly entered [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], leaving Pakkpekatt and his fleet behind.
